title: GameStop (GME) preannounces Q1 2024 earnings results revenue miss
text: GameStop released preliminary Q1 2024 earnings figures ahead of its full quarterly report. The company's net sales for the quarter came in between $0.872 billion and $0.892 billion, representing a significant decline from the $1.237 billion reported in Q1 2023. The results fell short of Wall Street's expectations, which had anticipated approximately $1 billion in quarterly revenue. Following the announcement, GameStop's stock experienced a downward movement on May 17. In related developments, the company announced plans to sell 45 million additional shares of common stock to the public. However, GameStop cautioned prospective investors about the stock's volatility, noting that the market price of our common stock has seen extreme price fluctuations that do not appear to be based on the underlying fundamentals since January 2021. The company advised investors to carefully evaluate risks before purchasing shares to prevent potential significant losses. The article emphasizes that GameStop continues to be recognized as one of the market's most volatile and closely-watched stocks.
